title: Buyer converts an approved quotation into a PO
user_persona: Buyer who has worked with the supplier through a quotation process

conversation.user: I have an approved quotation QTN-2024-7821 and I want to turn it into a PO.

bot_must: fire entry-screen search POCRTQTNTRN1 with quotation_no=QTN-2024-7821

conversation.user: Yes, that's the right quote. Use all the lines from it.

bot_must: load main create-from-quotation screen with quotation defaults
copy quotation header slots (supplier, currency, payment terms) into PO header
copy quotation lines as PO lines
ask user to confirm or modify

conversation.user: Looks good, but change the need date on line 1 to next Monday.

bot_must: ask if user is ready to create
fire POCRTQTNSUB (Create PO from Quotation submit)
report new PO number and that it's in Draft
mention quotation QTN-2024-7821 is now linked as source

evaluation_metrics.entry_search_fired_at_turn_1: POCRTQTNTRN1 must be the first task invoked
evaluation_metrics.header_slot_inheritance: supplier/currency/payment_terms inherited from quotation, not re-asked
evaluation_metrics.modification_capability: user must be able to override quotation slot at turn 3
evaluation_metrics.commit_task_correctness: POCRTQTNSUB not POCRTMAINSBT — this is from-quotation flow
